# The 6 Rules of Rick Rule.

### .... the last one makes it 7...

[](https://substack.com/@clemishere)

[Clem Chambers](https://substack.com/@clemishere)

Apr 28, 2026

∙ Paid

24

4 2

Share

I’ve just done a Youtube podcast with Rick Rule for my Clem Chambers Alpha channel. It was very interesting and will be out in a day or two. We both get to the same conclusion along different paths and that in itself made it a fascinating discussion. We compared notes, swapping scars and made sense of a world that will look obvious in hindsight but is extremely tricky in real time.

What struck me wasn’t the trades. It was the framework.

Strip away the anecdotes, the war stories, the Congo, the silver, the uranium… and what you’re left with is a system. A way of thinking that actually works.
